creator: sasaki12@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 219916
patch

When the SQL option is enabled, syslog-ng will link to old libraries such as /usr/local/lib/libsyslog-ng-3.29.so.0 when updating from 3.29.1 to 3.30.1.

The attached patch will fix this issue. I guess GEOIP2 has the same issue, but I don't know because I don't use it.
